name: 4" x 7" Unscented Candle White - Room Essentials™: Paraffin Wax, 120hr Burn Time, Single Wick
description:
Illuminate your space with the 4" x 7" Fragrance Free Candle White from Room Essentials™. This unscented candle is great for setting a minimal, bright ambiance. Crafted from paraffin wax, it's designed to go on for longer with an approximate burn time of 120 hours. With a single wick, this versatile pillar candle is ideal for setting the table for dinner parties or enjoying a quiet night in.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
